doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_flags_set (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L109-L115). Three-line C body: `__gmpfr_flags |= mask` -- OR the bits in mask into the global flag register.

The TS port takes (pre, mask) and returns the new flag state `(pre | mask) & MPFR_FLAGS_ALL`. Wire form encodes pre because the function depends on the prior global state.

Class 'misc' (1000ms per-case budget). Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c:
Three divergences:

  1. Return type: C returns void (mutates global state); TS returns bigint -- the new flag state after OR.

  2. Parameter list: C takes (mask); TS takes (pre, mask).

  3. Mechanism: `(pre | mask) & 63n`. Equivalent to calling setFlags(pre) then setFlags(mask) from src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts.
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L109-L115 -- the C reference body.
src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts -- the TS flag register module; setFlags(mask) is the canonical OR path.
